strategic_filters.cockroach_description: Private credit redemption stress confirmed: Invico Capital calls investors to manage exodus risk; Bloomberg reports 'Cockroach' credit woes spreading to bank balance sheets via AI infrastructure loan exposure (CoreWeave, neocloud). Redemption queues in LP structures signal illiquidity spreading beyond public markets.
strategic_filters.regime_decoupling_description: Gold ($5,247, +1.03%) and long-duration Treasuries rising simultaneously while equities sell off — historically consistent with stagflation fear, but unusual pairing with a still-inverted short end. Additionally, Bitcoin ETF inflows of $1.1bn (prior 3 days) coexist with BTC spot price -9% on Iran shock — institutional accumulation diverging from spot retail panic, a structural decoupling.

driver_articles.title: Iran War / Strait of Hormuz Oil Supply Shock

trade_logic.invalidation_point: Confirmed Iran-US ceasefire agreement or Hormuz shipping lanes declared reopened by USCG.

driver_articles.title: AI Infrastructure Capex Doubt — Nvidia / CoreWeave Correction

trade_logic.invalidation_point: Hyperscaler (MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN) confirms unchanged or increased AI capex guidance in next earnings call.

driver_articles.title: US Stagflation Signal + Fed Independence Crisis (Powell DOJ)

trade_logic.invalidation_point: DOJ investigation confirmed as political pressure campaign only (no grand jury); PCE prints below 2.5% in next release.

driver_articles.title: Trump Tariff Regime Collapse — Supreme Court Ruling

instruments: Short STLD / NUE (US steel loses tariff protection)
trade_logic.invalidation_point: Supreme Court ruling stayed pending appeal; tariff enforcement resumes under emergency order.

driver_articles.title: Gold Structural Breakout + Private Credit Stress Rotation

trade_logic.invalidation_point: Gold spot closes below $4,900 on two consecutive sessions; private credit redemption wave resolves without contagion.
